channel.title: Regression Testing on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Regression Testing on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: security: Turn specs into evals for any agent with ASSERT
item.description:
ASSERT is an open-source framework that turns natural-language behavior requirements into executable evaluations for AI models and agents. It is presented as a way to create evaluations and regression tests from specs.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog

item.title: commandline: Turn specs into evals for any agent with ASSERT
item.description:
ASSERT is an open-source framework that turns natural-language behavior requirements into executable evaluations for AI models and agents. It is designed for evaluation and regression testing from written specs.

  • Source: Microsoft Command Line Blog
